name: CORP | Configurator Product Labeling | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
what_it_does: Sets Primary Interested Product Model based on configurator form submission. Branches sequentially by model number (Branch 1 through Branch 20+). Uses 'model contains [number]' logic — important to include double-digit numbers (10, 11, 12, etc.) to avoid false matches.
notes: TT and TC versions exist as separate workflows. Linear branch processing — order matters.

name: CORP | Brochure Download Product Labeling | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
what_it_does: Sets product label based on page referrer URL. Branches by model-specific URL slug (e.g. rangeline-21ps, rangeline-21pl). When adding a new model, update the referrer slug to be specific — do not use a generic slug like 'rangeline' that would match multiple models.
danger_notes: Referrer logic must use specific slugs (e.g. 'rangeline-21ps') not broad terms (e.g. 'rangeline') to avoid mis-labeling contacts across models.
notes: Added branch for Rangeline 21PL June 2026. Rangeline 21PS branch updated from generic 'rangeline' slug to specific 'rangeline-21ps'.

name: CORP | Aimbase Lead Label + Webhook | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
what_it_does: Labels Aimbase leads and fires webhook to Aimbase. Branches by model to set product name. When adding a new model, clone steps from an existing model branch and update the product name property.
notes: Key properties sent to Aimbase: Contact info (name, email, phone, zip), Interest to Product Model Category (TT/TC), Lead Score, Source info, Record IDs. Added Rangeline 21PL branch June 2026 — cloned steps from 21PS branch.

name: CORP | Send Leads to Aimbase | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
trigger_description: Contact submits any hand-raiser or high-intent form
what_it_does: Master workflow for sending leads from HubSpot to Aimbase. 7-minute delay at start to allow other workflows to complete first. Branches for TT vs TC. Sends contact info, product interest, lead score, source, and record IDs to Aimbase.
enrollment_criteria: Contact submits any hand-raiser or high-intent form
danger_notes: CRITICAL: When adding new forms to enrollment triggers, always select the WHITE box (new contacts only), never the ORANGE box. Orange box re-enrolls ALL existing contacts — approximately 1.7 million — and will crash the system.
notes: This is one of the most mission-critical workflows in the instance. The 7-minute delay is intentional — do not remove it.

name: CORP | Lead Nurture Plinko | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
what_it_does: Main orchestrating workflow (the 'brain') that routes contacts into one of four lead nurture stages: Inspire, Experience Match, Configure & Build, Try & Buy. Contacts can only move forward through stages, never backward. When adding a new form, add it to the appropriate stage branch.
danger_notes: No duplicate forms across different stage branches. A form can only live in one stage.
notes: Stage definitions — Inspire: low intent/tire-kickers; Experience Match: guides/brochures/lifestyle; Configure & Build: configurator users/model comparisons; Try & Buy: financing/dealer contact. Delay times: Inspire = 21 days, Experience Match = 14 days, Configure & Build = 7 days, Try & Buy = 4 days. ~24,000 contacts currently in holding pattern.

name: CORP | Simplified Lead Score | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
what_it_does: Converts raw 0-500 lead score to simplified 1-5 scale for Aimbase. Branch logic: 5 = hand-raiser form submitted in last 30 days; 4 = score >250; 3 = score 151-250; 2 = score 51-150; 1 = score <51.
notes: Score 5 is trigger-based (hand-raiser form), not threshold-based. Scores 1-4 are threshold-based on the 0-500 raw score.

name: AMP | Meta Lead Form Routing | General | WF | E3
creator: E3
what_it_does: Routes leads from Meta lead forms into HubSpot. When a new model is added, get updated Meta lead form names from Allison/Bennett and add new form to routing logic.
notes: Meta form names must be confirmed with Allison or Bennett before updating — do not guess form names.
